zh.Raby, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert De Neville於大約1128年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比時，他的父親GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire31歲，母親FNU MNU married NEVILLE29歲。他於大約1149年與JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1168年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert De Neville于大约1128年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比时，他的父亲GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire31岁，母亲FNU MNU married NEVILLE29岁。他于大约1149年与JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1168年在他的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert De Neville was born about 1128, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire, was 31 and his mother, FNU MNU married NEVILLE, was 29. He married JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville about 1149, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1168, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert De Neville est né environ 1128, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire, avait 31 ans et sa mère, FNU MNU married NEVILLE, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville environ 1149, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1168, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert De Neville um 1128 in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire 31 und seine Mutter FNU MNU married NEVILLE 29. Er hat um 1149 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert De Neville è nato il circa 1128 nel Raby, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, FNU MNU married NEVILLE, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville circa 1149, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1168, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Nevilleが約1128年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshireは31歳，母FNU MNU married NEVILLEは29歳であった。約1149年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでJOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1168年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Neville(이)가 대략 1128년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 FNU MNU married NEVILLE(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1168년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert De Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, FNU MNU married NEVILLE, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville aproximadamente 1149, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1168, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert De Neville родился около 1128 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire было 31 год, а матери, которую звали FNU MNU married NEVILLE, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville около 1149 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1168 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert De Neville nació aproximadamente 1128, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire, tenía 31 años y su mamá, FNU MNU married NEVILLE, tenía 29 años. Se casó con JOHANNA de CLARE Lady Plicia Baroness Neville aproximadamente 1149, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1168, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
